name: Garam Masala Grilled Chicken
author: Joel Mielle
description: Smoky, juicy, and full of spice. Grilled, golden, and deeply spiced, these chicken thighs are marinated in garam masala, lemon, and yoghurt for a tender, rich flavour that’s easy to make but tastes restaurant-worthy.

step_sections.name: Garam Masala Grilled Chicken
steps: In a mixing bowl, add plain or Greek yoghurt, garam masala, cumin, smoked paprika, grated garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, olive oil, and sea salt. Mix until smooth.
Add the chicken thighs to the marinade, coat well using clean hands or tongs. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or overnight for best flavour.
Preheat a grill or griddle pan over medium-high heat.
Grill the marinated chicken thighs for 5 to 6 minutes on each side, or until lightly charred and fully cooked through.
Remove from the heat and rest the chicken for a few minutes before slicing.
Serve warm with a fresh cucumber, red onion, and mint salad, or wrap in flatbread with a drizzle of tahini or yoghurt sauce.

step_sections.name: For the Salad
steps: In a mixing bowl, combine sliced cucumber, red onion, and dill or mint leaves.
Add lemon juice, olive oil, and sea salt. Toss gently and set aside to marinate.
In a separate bowl, add yoghurt, tahini, grated garlic, lemon juice, olive oil, and sea salt.
Mix until smooth. Add a splash of water if the sauce is too thick.
Serve the salad chilled alongside the grilled chicken, or use both in a warm flatbread wrap.

step_sections.name: For the yoghurt tahini sauce
steps: Simply add all ingredients to a mixing bowl and mix well.

notes: If you're short on time, 30 minutes of marinating will still give decent flavour — just increase the spice a little.
